name: Daiken Medical Co., Ltd.
summary: Daiken Medical Co., Ltd. manufactures and distributes medical devices and equipment in Japan and internationally. The company's products include syringe pumps, disposable infusion pumps, portable disposable infusors, endobronchinal blocker tubes, suction containers, connecting tubes, suction tips, medical hand washing machines, disposable medical towels, and sterilize mats. It also trades in medical equipment. The company sells its products under the COOPDECH brand name. Daiken Medical Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Izumi, Japan.
